Annual rainfall (523.775 mm) is also significantly insufficient, necessitating extensive irrigation. Operational risks include extremely slow growth and poor leaf quality due to cold, and high irrigation costs. Mitigation would require greenhouses and substantial water infrastructure, making commercial viability highly questionable.
